name: Black Swan
desc: A Memokeeper of the Garden of Recollection. An indolent and mysterious soothsayer.\n"Remembrance" of men are hers to heed, threads of fate are hers to tug.

1.name: Seven Pillars of Wisdom
1.desc: While Black Swan is active in combat, enemies afflicted with Wind Shear, Bleed, Burn, or Shock will have their corresponding Wind, Physical, Fire, or Lightning RES respectively reduced by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

2.name: Weep Not For Me, My Lamb
2.desc: When an enemy target afflicted with "<u>Arcana</u>" is defeated, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> of inflicting <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> stack(s) of "<u>Arcana</u>" on adjacent targets.

10013071.name: Arcana
10013071.desc: "Arcana" is a debuff that deals DMG over time. This debuff cannot be dispelled.\nWhile in the "Arcana" state, the unit is also considered to be in the Wind Shear state and takes Wind DoT at the start of each turn.\nThe infliction of "Arcana" ignores the target's Wind Shear RES, Bleed RES, Burn RES, and Shock RES.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

3.name: As Above, So Below
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

4.name: In Tears We Gift
4.desc: While in the Epiphany state, enemy targets have their Effect RES reduced by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> and Black Swan regenerates <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Energy at the start of these targets' turns or when they are defeated. This Energy Regeneration effect can only trigger up to 1 time while Epiphany lasts. The trigger count is reset when Epiphany is applied again.

5.name: Linnutee Flyway
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

6.name: Pantheon Merciful, Masses Pitiful
6.desc: When an enemy target is attacked by Black Swan's teammates, Black Swan has a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> of inflicting 1 stack of "<u>Arcana</u>" on the target.\nEvery time Black Swan inflicts "<u>Arcana</u>" on an enemy target, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>fixed chance</u> to additionally increase the number of "<u>Arcana</u>" stacked this time by <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak>.

10013071.name: Arcana
10013071.desc: "Arcana" is a debuff that deals DMG over time. This debuff cannot be dispelled.\nWhile in the "Arcana" state, the unit is also considered to be in the Wind Shear state and takes Wind DoT at the start of each turn.\nThe infliction of "Arcana" ignores the target's Wind Shear RES, Bleed RES, Burn RES, and Shock RES.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

30000002.name: Fixed Chance
30000002.desc: Fixed chance will not be affected by any factor.

130701.name: Percipience, Silent Dawn
130701.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Black Swan's ATK to one designated enemy target, with a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>base chance</u> of inflicting 1 stack of "<u>Arcana</u>" on the target. Additionally, when attacking a target that suffers Wind Shear, Bleed, Burn, or Shock, there is respectively a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>base chance</u> of inflicting 1 extra stack of "<u>Arcana</u>" on the target.
130701.simple_desc: Deals minor Wind DMG to one enemy and has a chance of applying "<u>Arcana</u>" to the target. After attacking a target that suffers <color=#f29e38ff>Wind Shear, Bleed, Burn, or Shock</color>, there is respectively a chance of <color=#f29e38ff>additionally applying "<u>Arcana</u>"</color>.

10013071.name: Arcana
10013071.desc: "Arcana" is a debuff that deals DMG over time. This debuff cannot be dispelled.\nWhile in the "Arcana" state, the unit is also considered to be in the Wind Shear state and takes Wind DoT at the start of each turn.\nThe infliction of "Arcana" ignores the target's Wind Shear RES, Bleed RES, Burn RES, and Shock RES.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

130702.name: Decadence, False Twilight
130702.desc: Deals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Black Swan's ATK to one designated enemy target and any adjacent targets. At the same time, there is a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> of inflicting 1 stack of "<u>Arcana</u>" on the target enemy and the adjacent targets. Additionally, there is a <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> of reducing the DEF of the target enemy and the adjacent targets by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[f1]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
130702.simple_desc: Deals minor Wind DMG to one enemy target and any adjacent targets, with a high chance of <color=#f29e38ff>inflicting "<u>Arcana</u>"</color> on the targets and lowering their DEF.

10013071.name: Arcana
10013071.desc: "Arcana" is a debuff that deals DMG over time. This debuff cannot be dispelled.\nWhile in the "Arcana" state, the unit is also considered to be in the Wind Shear state and takes Wind DoT at the start of each turn.\nThe infliction of "Arcana" ignores the target's Wind Shear RES, Bleed RES, Burn RES, and Shock RES.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

130703.name: Bliss of <unbreak>Otherworld's Embrace</unbreak>
130703.desc: Inflicts Epiphany on all enemies for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s).\nWhile afflicted with Epiphany, enemies take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> increased DMG in their turn. Additionally, if enemies are also inflicted with <u>Arcana</u>, they are also considered to be simultaneously afflicted with Wind Shear, Bleed, Burn, and Shock. After <u>Arcana</u> causes DMG at the start of each turn, its stacks are not reset. This non-reset effect of <u>Arcana</u> stacks can be triggered up to <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> time(s) for the duration of Epiphany. And the trigger count resets when Epiphany is applied again.\nDeals Wind DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Black Swan's ATK to all enemies.
130703.simple_desc: Inflicts Epiphany on all enemies, increasing the DMG the targets take in their turn. Additionally, <color=#f29e38ff>having <u>Arcana</u> is regarded as having Wind Shear, Bleed, Burn, and Shock</color>. Furthermore, <u>Arcana</u> will not reset its stacks after causing DMG at the start of the next turn. Deals Wind DMG to all enemies.

10013071.name: Arcana
10013071.desc: "Arcana" is a debuff that deals DMG over time. This debuff cannot be dispelled.\nWhile in the "Arcana" state, the unit is also considered to be in the Wind Shear state and takes Wind DoT at the start of each turn.\nThe infliction of "Arcana" ignores the target's Wind Shear RES, Bleed RES, Burn RES, and Shock RES.

130704.name: Loom of Fate's Caprice
130704.desc:
Every time an enemy target receives DoT at the start of each turn, there is a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>base chance</u> for it to be inflicted with 1 stack of <u>Arcana</u>.
While afflicted with <u>Arcana</u>, enemy targets receive Wind DoT equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Black Swan's ATK at the start of each turn. Each stack of <u>Arcana</u> increases this DMG multiplier by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[f1]%</unbreak></color>. Then <u>Arcana</u> resets to 1 stack. <u>Arcana</u> can stack up to <unbreak>#8[i]</unbreak> times.
Only when <u>Arcana</u> causes DMG at the start of an enemy target's turn, Black Swan triggers additional effects based on the number of <u>Arcana</u> stacks inflicted on the target:
When there are <unbreak>#4[i]</unbreak> or more <u>Arcana</u> stacks, deals Wind DoT equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak></color> of Black Swan's ATK to adjacent targets, with a <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>base chance</u> of inflicting 1 stack of <u>Arcana</u> on adjacent targets.
When there are <unbreak>#6[i]</unbreak> or more <u>Arcana</u> stacks, enables the current DoT dealt this time to ignore <unbreak>#7[i]%</unbreak> of the target's and adjacent targets' DEF.
130704.simple_desc: When an enemy target receives DoT at the start of each turn, there is a chance for it to be inflicted with <u>Arcana</u>. They receive <color=#f29e38ff>Wind DoT</color> at the start of the turn, and Black Swan triggers <color=#f29e38ff>additional effects</color> based on the number of <u>Arcana</u> stacks.

10013071.name: Arcana
10013071.desc: "Arcana" is a debuff that deals DMG over time. This debuff cannot be dispelled.\nWhile in the "Arcana" state, the unit is also considered to be in the Wind Shear state and takes Wind DoT at the start of each turn.\nThe infliction of "Arcana" ignores the target's Wind Shear RES, Bleed RES, Burn RES, and Shock RES.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

130706.name: Attack
130706.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

130707.name: From Façade to Vérité
130707.desc: After this Technique is used, there is a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> for each enemy to be inflicted with 1 stack of <u>Arcana</u> at the start of the next battle. For each successful application of <u>Arcana</u> on a target, inflicts another stack of <u>Arcana</u> on the same target. This process repeats until <u>Arcana</u> fails to be inflicted on this target. For each successive application of <u>Arcana</u> on a target, its <u>base chance</u> of success is equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of the <u>base chance</u> of the previous successful infliction of <u>Arcana</u> on that target.
130707.simple_desc: After this Technique is used, at the start of the next battle, there is a high chance for each enemy to be <color=#f29e38ff>inflicted with Arcana repeatedly until <u>Arcana</u> fails to be inflicted</color>.

10013071.name: Arcana
10013071.desc: "Arcana" is a debuff that deals DMG over time. This debuff cannot be dispelled.\nWhile in the "Arcana" state, the unit is also considered to be in the Wind Shear state and takes Wind DoT at the start of each turn.\nThe infliction of "Arcana" ignores the target's Wind Shear RES, Bleed RES, Burn RES, and Shock RES.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

1.point_desc: After using Skill to attack one designated enemy that has Wind Shear, Bleed, Burn, or Shock, each of these debuffs respectively has a <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> of inflicting 1 extra stack of <u>Arcana</u>.

The maximum number of stacks that can be inflicted during 1 single attack is <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak>.

30000001.name: Base Chance

1.point_desc: Increases this unit's DMG by an amount equal to <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak> of Effect Hit Rate, up to a maximum DMG increase of <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

descs: "Arcana" can <color=#f29e38ff>take into calculation stacks exceeding the maximum limit</color>, and <color=#f29e38ff>retains half of its stacks</color> upon reset.
Can increase <color=#f29e38ff>DMG dealt by all allies</color>

1130703.name: Bliss of Otherworld's Embrace
1130703.desc: Inflicts "Epiphany" state on all enemies for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s). Then deals Wind DMG to all enemies equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Black Swan's ATK.\nWhile in the "Epiphany" state, enemy targets take <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak></color> increased DMG. Additionally, "<u>Arcana</u>" stacks won't be halved after dealing DMG at the start of the next turn. Deals Wind DMG to all enemies.
